# Magic Friendz
# https://edhstatstracker.xyz/

> Free EDH Commander playgroup stats tracker by Mat Kliment.
> Log pod results, playgroup Elo, win rates, deck lists, and match history.

## Primary pages
- Home: https://edhstatstracker.xyz/
- About: https://edhstatstracker.xyz/about.html
- All groups: https://edhstatstracker.xyz/groups.html

## Product summary
Magic Friendz helps Magic: The Gathering Commander playgroups track match results over time.
Features include commander and player Elo leaderboards, match logging with elimination details,
session recaps, playgroup insights (rivalries, top eliminators, how you lose stats), roster management,
and group data export (JSON / CSV).

## Differentiator
Magic Friendz tracks stats and Elo **per playgroup**, not on a global ladder.
Each group has its own match history, leaderboards, and ratings built from that pod's games only.
Rankings reflect your table's power level and local meta — not strangers across the internet.
Tagline: "Elo for your pod, not a global ladder."

## Access model
- View stats: open a group link (no account required)
- Log matches / edit roster: magic-link email sign-in (no password)

## Group URL format
https://edhstatstracker.xyz/?group=GROUP_SLUG

## Creator
Mat Kliment — founder and developer of Magic Friendz
GitHub: https://github.com/matuskliment/magic-friendz-tracker

## Contact
Use the Contact link on the homepage.
